title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
Student at BYUI.

mojozach32@gmail.com  | Download PDF



Brigham Young University - Idaho September 2025 - April 2028/ Rexburg, ID - Sophomore Standing - Relevant Coursework - Programming Fundamentals - Data Structures (planned/in progress) - Computer Systems


Engineering / Technical Intern

title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
Brigham Young University - Idaho September 2025 - April 2028/ Rexburg, ID - Sophomore Standing - Relevant Coursework - Programming Fundamentals - Data Structures (planned/in progress) - Computer Systems


Engineering / Technical Intern

title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
OBJECTIVE
Motivated Computer Science student at Brigham Young University seeking an internship or entry-level role where I apply programming, CAD design, and problem-solving skills to real-world technical challenges

title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES
Python - C# - HTML - Technical Tools - AutoCAD / CAD Design - Basic Cybersecurity Concepts

title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
OTHER SKILLS

Problem Solving
Team Collaboration
Technical Communication


LEADERSHIP & SERVICE
Church Leadership Service Boy Scouts of America - Achieved Eagle Scout - Planned and executed a community service project requiring leadership, logistics, and team coordination - Developed strong leadership, perseverance, and service values - Held multiple leadership positions in church callings - Organized group activities and service projects - Mentored and supported members of youth and community groups


ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
Originally from Buffalo - Interested in software development, cybersecurity, and engineering technology - Strong work ethic with proven leadership and teamwork experience
